name: L'Étoile Tapas Platter
desc: A luxurious spread of assorted starters featuring miniature burgers, fries, garlic crostini, chicken wings, and gourmet dips.

name: Avocado Egg Toast
desc: Thick sourdough toast topped with sliced organic boiled eggs, fresh avocado slices, spinach, and microgreens.

name: Crispy Calamari & Bloomin' Onion
desc: Golden fried calamari rings served alongside a crispy spiced bloomin' onion flower and garlic sauce.

name: Sliced Beef Steak Strips
desc: Tender grilled beef steak strips served with sliced red onions, fresh lettuce, and dipping sauce.

name: Steamed Momos with Chutney
desc: Thin-skin dumplings filled with seasoned vegetables, served with hot red chili chutney and mayonnaise.

name: Spicy Pani Puri / Gol Gappa
desc: Crispy hollow puri shells filled with spiced potato and chickpea mix, topped with green chilies, onions, and tangy water.

name: Grilled Corn & Cheese Sandwich
desc: Toasted panini loaded with sweet corn kernels, green bell peppers, and melted cheddar and mozzarella cheese.

name: Samosa Cholay Chaat
desc: Two crispy potato samosas served in a bowl of spicy chickpea curry (cholay) and garnished with sweet yogurt and mint.

name: Balsamic Salmon Fillet
desc: Pan-seared salmon fillet resting on sautéed garlic spinach, topped with a cucumber tomato salsa and balsamic reduction.

name: Bacon Cheeseburger & Fries
desc: A gourmet beef patty topped with crispy bacon, melted cheese, and onion strings in a toasted bun, served with fries.

name: Honey BBQ Pork Ribs Plate
desc: Slow-roasted tender pork ribs glazed in our house honey BBQ sauce, served with fresh lettuce salad.

name: Double Slabs BBQ Ribs Board
desc: Double portion of smoked pork ribs glazed in honey BBQ sauce, served on a rustic wooden board with roasted peppers.

name: Grand BBQ Ribs Platter
desc: A full slab of honey BBQ ribs served with fresh tomato slices, pickles, and a bucket of cheesy French fries.

name: Veg Manchurian with Noodles
desc: Crispy vegetable dumplings tossed in a dark, tangy soy-garlic Manchurian sauce, paired with stir-fried hakka noodles.

name: Paneer Masala & Paratha Feast
desc: Rich paneer tikka masala served with flaky, layered lacha paratha, sliced green chilies, and a side bowl of sweet rasgullas.

name: Classic Chole Bhature Platter
desc: Two large, fluffy fried bhature breads served with a bowl of spicy chickpea curry, green chutney, pickle, and onions.

name: Tandoori Chicken Leg Quarters
desc: Two leg quarters marinated in red yogurt spices and charcoal grilled, served with sliced onions and mint chutney.

name: Fries, Pizza & Coffee Combo
desc: A classic personal cheese pizza served with a tray of spiced french fries and two cold coffees with chocolate drizzle.

name: Veg Chow Mein Noodles
desc: Stir-fried noodles tossed with julienned carrots, cabbage, onions, and green bell peppers in light soy sauce.

name: Baked Fusilli Bolognese
desc: Fusilli pasta tossed in a rich minced meat bolognese sauce, loaded with mozzarella and baked until bubbly, served with garlic bread.

name: Saffron Banana French Toast
desc: Thick-sliced brioche soaked in saffron cardamom custard, griddled golden, and topped with sliced bananas, blueberries, and honey.

name: Chocolate Waffles on Sticks
desc: Triangular waffle slices served on sticks, heavily drizzled with milk chocolate, white chocolate sauce, and chocolate chips.

name: Saffron Pistachio Rasmalai
desc: Soft and spongy cottage cheese dumplings soaked in rich, saffron-infused cardamom milk, garnished with sliced almonds and pistachios.

name: Crispy Saffron Jalebi
desc: Crispy, syrup-soaked spiral sweets infused with premium saffron strands, served warm.
